name: Quick Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
3. Form the dough into 1-inch balls and place them 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Flatten each cookie with a fork that has been dipped in sugar.
5. Bake for 9-12 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheet.
7. Yield: Approximately 48 cookies.
